turns.user_message: I tried to cheer myself up today, but it just made me feel worse. I don't know why I can't shake this off.
I keep trying to distract myself, but the feeling always comes back stronger. It's like I'm stuck in a loop I can't escape.
Every attempt to feel better just proves how broken I am inside. I'm starting to believe I deserve to feel this way forever.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
